hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get("tool_response") or {}).get("filePath") or (d.get("tool_input") or {}).get("file_path") or "")' | { read -r f; case "$f" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/apps/ml/sgivu-ml/*.py) "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/ml/sgivu-ml/.venv/bin/black" -q "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
